article_title: 在 C# 中构建 MCP 服务器和客户端：完整指南
core_theme: 用 C# SDK 构建 MCP Server（工具/资源/提示词）+ Client（Stdio/HTTP）→ 接入 Microsoft.Extensions.AI → Agent 调用
reader_takeaway: 学会用 C# 构建 MCP Server 和 Client，让 AI Agent 通过标准协议发现和调用你的工具
summary_angle: 从 C# 代码中的方法 → 通过 [McpServerTool] 暴露为 MCP 工具 → Agent 通过 MCP Client 发现并调用

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 [McpServerTool] 定义工具 + DI 注入
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧：C# 代码中标记了 [McpServerTool] 的方法

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 MCP Server 暴露 Stdio/HTTP 传输 + Client 发现工具列表
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中心：MCP Server 和 MCP Client 通过 JSON-RPC 握手，Client 列出工具

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文 McpClientTool 继承 AIFunction → 传给 IChatClient
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧：Agent/LLM 通过 IChatClient 调用从 MCP Server 发现的工具

main_metaphor: C# 方法通过 MCP 协议桥变成 AI Agent 可以调用的远程能力
primary_subject: 一条从左到右的连接：C# 代码 → MCP Server → JSON-RPC → MCP Client → AI Agent/LLM
subject_action: C# 工具方法从左端被暴露，经过协议传输到右端被 Agent 发现和调用
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: dynamic cinematic storyboard style, sequential panels, camera-motion feeling, strong cuts, clear narrative beats
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，本篇从风格池随机选中；分镜的序列感和阶段性推进适合表达 MCP 从定义→暴露→调用的流程
style_safety_note: 清单风格为泛类型描述，不涉及品牌、工作室或艺术家复刻
draft_goal: 验证从代码定义 → 协议暴露 → Agent 调用的三段叙事是否成立
revision_targets: 三段的分镜面板区分不够清晰时加强
标签太小或模糊时放大
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide infographic-story cover illustration. Theme: Building MCP servers and clients in C# - exposing C# methods as MCP tools for AI agents to discover and call.

Summary angle: From C# code methods → exposed as MCP tools via [McpServerTool] → discovered and called by AI agents through MCP Client.
Narrative flow: 3-beat process. 2.35:1 wide frame.
Information blocks:
- Step (left): C# methods annotated with [McpServerTool] attribute ready to be exposed — label '定义工具', fact '[McpServerTool]'
- Mechanism (center): MCP Server and Client handshake over JSON-RPC, Client lists available tools — label '协议握手', fact 'JSON-RPC'
- Takeaway (right): AI agent calling discovered tools through IChatClient — label 'Agent 调用', fact 'IChatClient'

Main metaphor: C# methods traveling across the MCP protocol bridge to become callable AI agent capabilities.
Subject: A left-to-right flow: C# code methods (left) → MCP Server exposing tools → JSON-RPC protocol bridge → MCP Client discovering tools → AI agent calling them (right).
Composition: Left-to-right progressive panels.
Style: combine editorial technical illustration with selected visual style descriptor: dynamic cinematic storyboard style, sequential panels, camera-motion feeling, strong cuts, clear narrative beats. Stylized, editorial, visually strong. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: slate blue, electric teal, warm amber accent, dark charcoal.
Visible text: only 3 Chinese labels: '定义工具', '协议握手', 'Agent 调用'. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans.
Constraints: no watermark, no screenshots, no fake UIs, no fake code editors, no fake terminals, no fabricated metrics.
Avoid: code rain, neon lighting, robot figures, cyberpunk colors, decorative clutter, fake IDE panels.
